description: You have received a raw line list from a hospital regarding a gastroenteritis outbreak, but the data is inconsistent. Use Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis to clean and standardize the dataset located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\oswego_messy.csv. Standardize the Sex variable by converting all variations ('m', 'M', 'Male') to 'Male' and ('f', 'F', 'Female') to 'Female'. Standardize the Ill variable by converting all variations ('1', 'y', 'Y', 'Yes') to 'Yes' and ('0', 'n', 'N', 'No') to 'No'. Clean the Age variable by converting the sentinel value 999 to Missing (null). Export the cleaned dataset to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\oswego_clean.csv.
